message:
Fix Windows browser open command and sync beads

- Fix `jfp open` command on Windows by using cmd.exe
  - On Windows, 'start' is a shell built-in, not an executable
  - Use 'cmd /c start "" url' pattern for correct behavior
  - Empty string after 'start' prevents URL being treated as window title
- Sync beads with latest task updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
